sub_modules.bpf_sample_shift: Pure combinational next-state generator for the FIR sample delay line; inserts the incoming sample at tap 0 and shifts prior samples toward higher tap indices.
sub_modules.bpf_coeff_bank: Pure combinational hard-coded 101-tap coefficient ROM bank with the exact required signed 16-bit quantized band-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.bpf_mac: Pure combinational signed multiply-accumulate block; multiplies the shifted sample vector by the coefficient vector and accumulates into a 64-bit signed sum.
sub_modules.bpf_scale: Pure combinational fixed-point output scaler; arithmetic right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 15 bits and truncates to the DATA_W+GAIN_W output width.
